buses.note: Bus routes serve Ascot via Racecourse Road and Nudgee Road.

driving.motorway_access: Direct Gateway Motorway access for the airport and M1.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 12 to 16 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.
driving.airport_access_note: Brisbane Airport approximately 8 to 12 minutes off-peak.

secondary_state.name: Aviation High or other catchment varies

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Racecourse Road is the village dining strip with cafes, restaurants, and bars. Portside Wharf at Hamilton is a short drive for additional dining.

pockets.name: Premium ridge streets
pockets.character: Hilltop blocks with grand homes, tightly held. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Racecourse Road village
pockets.character: Streets close to the dining strip. Walkability is the proposition.

pockets.name: Nudgee Road area
pockets.character: Closer to the arterial with a different character.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving up to one of Brisbane's most established premium suburbs.
Sydney and Melbourne relocators drawn by airport proximity and the heritage character.
Parents targeting the local primary catchment and the private school options.
